---
title: "UIAO — Unified Identity-Addressing-Overlay Architecture"
subtitle: "A universal governance substrate for identity, addressing, and overlay networks."
pagetitle: "UIAO — Unified Identity-Addressing-Overlay Architecture"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
          <style>
            :root {
              --uiao-navy:    #0D1B2E;
              --uiao-teal:    #1E8C8C;
              --uiao-teal-lt: #27BEBE;
              --uiao-teal-bg: #e9f6f5;
              --uiao-amber:   #B27210;
              --uiao-amber-lt:#E8A020;
              --uiao-steel:   #6B7A8D;
              --uiao-ink:     #243248;
              --uiao-muted:   #5a6878;
              --uiao-paper:   #ffffff;
              --uiao-paper-2: #f5f7fa;
              --uiao-paper-3: #eef2f7;
              --uiao-line:    #dfe5ec;
            }

            /* Suppress only the auto-generated title/subtitle block (we render our own hero) */
            body #title-block-header { display: none !important; }

            /* Full-bleed scope: stretch the article container */
            body main.content,
            body div#quarto-document-content,
            body div.page-columns {
              padding-left: 0 !important;
              padding-right: 0 !important;
              max-width: none !important;
            }

            /* Landing scope */
            .uiao-landing {
              font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif;
              color: var(--uiao-ink); line-height: 1.7;
              -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            }
            .uiao-landing a { color: var(--uiao-teal); }
            .uiao-landing a:hover { color: var(--uiao-teal-lt); }

            /* Hero (shorter — sits below the Quarto navbar) */
            .uiao-landing .uiao-hero {
              padding: 5rem 3rem 4rem;
              text-align: center;
              background:
                radial-gradient(900px 380px at 80% 0%, rgba(30,140,140,0.12), transparent 70%),
                radial-gradient(700px 280px at 0% 30%, rgba(232,160,32,0.10), transparent 70%),
                var(--uiao-paper);
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
            }
            .uiao-landing .uiao-hero .hero-eyebrow {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .2em;
              color: var(--uiao-amber); text-transform: uppercase;
              margin-bottom: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .uiao-hero h1 {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
              font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 6vw, 5rem);
              font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -.02em;
              color: var(--uiao-navy); max-width: 18ch;
              margin: 0 auto 1.25rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .uiao-hero h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--uiao-teal); }
            .uiao-landing .uiao-hero .hero-sub {
              font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--uiao-muted);
              max-width: 60ch; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .hero-actions {
              display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
            }
            .uiao-landing .btn-primary,
            .uiao-landing .btn-ghost {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .82rem; letter-spacing: .08em;
              padding: .85rem 1.8rem;
              text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase;
              font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px;
              transition: background .2s, transform .15s, box-shadow .2s, border-color .2s, color .2s;
              display: inline-block;
            }
            .uiao-landing .btn-primary {
              background: var(--uiao-teal); color: white !important; border: 1px solid var(--uiao-teal);
            }
            .uiao-landing .btn-primary:hover {
              background: var(--uiao-teal-lt); border-color: var(--uiao-teal-lt);
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 10px 22px -10px rgba(30,140,140,0.5);
            }
            .uiao-landing .btn-ghost {
              border: 1px solid var(--uiao-steel);
              color: var(--uiao-navy) !important; background: white;
            }
            .uiao-landing .btn-ghost:hover {
              border-color: var(--uiao-teal); color: var(--uiao-teal) !important;
              transform: translateY(-2px);
            }

            /* Marquee */
            .uiao-landing .marquee-wrap {
              overflow: hidden;
              border-top: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              padding: 0.9rem 0; background: var(--uiao-paper-2);
            }
            .uiao-landing .marquee-track {
              display: flex; gap: 3rem; white-space: nowrap;
              animation: uiaoMarquee 30s linear infinite;
            }
            .uiao-landing .marquee-item {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .15em;
              color: var(--uiao-muted); text-transform: uppercase;
              flex-shrink: 0;
            }
            .uiao-landing .marquee-item span { color: var(--uiao-teal); margin-right: .6rem; }

            /* Sections */
            .uiao-landing .uiao-section { padding: 5rem 3rem; }
            .uiao-landing .section-label {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em;
              color: var(--uiao-amber); text-transform: uppercase;
              margin-bottom: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .section-title {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
              font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.4vw, 2.6rem); line-height: 1.18;
              color: var(--uiao-navy); max-width: 26ch;
              margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .section-body {
              color: var(--uiao-muted); max-width: 64ch; font-size: 1rem;
            }

            /* Pillars row (Governance · Compliance · Modernization) */
            .uiao-landing .pillars {
              max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
              display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar {
              background: white; border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              border-top: 3px solid var(--uiao-teal);
              border-radius: 6px; padding: 2rem 1.6rem;
              transition: transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, border-color .15s ease;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar.compliance   { border-top-color: var(--uiao-amber-lt); }
            .uiao-landing .pillar.modernization { border-top-color: #6a8caf; }
            .uiao-landing .pillar:hover {
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 14px 30px -18px rgba(13,27,46,0.18);
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar-label {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .7rem; letter-spacing: .18em;
              color: var(--uiao-teal); text-transform: uppercase;
              font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar.compliance .pillar-label { color: var(--uiao-amber); }
            .uiao-landing .pillar.modernization .pillar-label { color: #4a6a8c; }
            .uiao-landing .pillar h3 {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
              color: var(--uiao-navy); font-size: 1.5rem;
              margin: .6rem 0 .8rem; line-height: 1.2;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar p {
              color: var(--uiao-muted); font-size: .95rem; margin: 0 0 1rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar-link {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .12em;
              color: var(--uiao-teal); text-transform: uppercase;
              text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .pillar-link:hover { color: var(--uiao-teal-lt); }
            .uiao-landing .pillar-link::after { content: ' →'; }

            /* Problem */
            .uiao-landing .problem {
              background: var(--uiao-paper-2);
              border-top: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
            }
            .uiao-landing .problem-grid {
              display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem;
              max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; align-items: start;
            }
            .uiao-landing .problem-list {
              list-style: none; margin: 1.5rem 0 0; padding: 0;
              display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .problem-list li {
              display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
              color: var(--uiao-ink); font-size: .98rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .problem-list li::before {
              content: '//'; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              color: var(--uiao-teal); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: .1rem;
              font-weight: 500;
            }

            /* Concepts */
            .uiao-landing .concepts { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
            .uiao-landing .concepts-header { margin-bottom: 3rem; max-width: 760px; }
            .uiao-landing .concepts-grid {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
              gap: 1px; background: var(--uiao-line);
              border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line); border-radius: 6px;
              overflow: hidden;
            }
            .uiao-landing .concept-card {
              background: white; padding: 1.6rem 1.5rem;
              transition: background .2s;
            }
            .uiao-landing .concept-card:hover { background: var(--uiao-teal-bg); }
            .uiao-landing .concept-num {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .2em;
              color: var(--uiao-teal); margin-bottom: .6rem; font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .concept-name {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
              font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--uiao-navy);
              margin-bottom: .5rem; line-height: 1.25;
            }
            .uiao-landing .concept-desc {
              font-size: .88rem; color: var(--uiao-muted); line-height: 1.55;
            }

            /* Planes */
            .uiao-landing .planes-wrap {
              background: var(--uiao-paper-3);
              border-top: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
            }
            .uiao-landing .planes-inner {
              max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
              display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.6fr;
              gap: 4rem; align-items: center;
            }
            .uiao-landing .planes-list {
              display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .4rem;
              margin-top: 1.5rem; background: white;
              border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line); border-radius: 6px;
              padding: .5rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .plane-item {
              display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
              padding: .85rem 1.1rem;
              border-left: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 2px;
              transition: border-color .2s, background .2s;
            }
            .uiao-landing .plane-item:hover {
              border-color: var(--uiao-teal); background: var(--uiao-teal-bg);
            }
            .uiao-landing .plane-dot {
              width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
              background: var(--uiao-teal); flex-shrink: 0;
              box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(30,140,140,0.12);
            }
            .uiao-landing .plane-label {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .8rem; color: var(--uiao-ink); letter-spacing: .04em;
            }

            /* Compliance */
            .uiao-landing .compliance-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
            .uiao-landing .compliance-header { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; max-width: 760px; }
            .uiao-landing .badge-grid {
              display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .75rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .badge {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .74rem; letter-spacing: .12em;
              padding: .6rem 1.1rem;
              border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              color: var(--uiao-navy); text-transform: uppercase;
              background: white; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500;
              transition: background .2s, border-color .2s, color .2s, transform .15s;
            }
            .uiao-landing .badge:hover {
              background: var(--uiao-teal-bg); border-color: var(--uiao-teal);
              color: var(--uiao-teal); transform: translateY(-1px);
            }

            /* CTA */
            .uiao-landing .cta-band {
              background:
                radial-gradient(700px 280px at 100% 0%, rgba(30,140,140,0.18), transparent 70%),
                radial-gradient(500px 220px at 0% 100%, rgba(232,160,32,0.14), transparent 70%),
                var(--uiao-paper-2);
              border-top: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              text-align: center;
            }
            .uiao-landing .cta-band .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1rem; }
            .uiao-landing .cta-band .section-body { margin: 0 auto 2rem; }

            @keyframes uiaoMarquee {
              from { transform: translateX(0); }
              to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
            }

            @media (max-width: 900px) {
              .uiao-landing .pillars { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
              .uiao-landing .problem-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
              .uiao-landing .planes-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
            }
            @media (max-width: 640px) {
              .uiao-landing .uiao-section { padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem; }
              .uiao-landing .uiao-hero { padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem 3rem; }
            }

            /* Overview narrative */
            .uiao-landing .uiao-overview-section {
              max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
            }
            .uiao-landing .overview-narrative {
              max-width: 72ch; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
              color: var(--uiao-ink); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.75;
            }
            .uiao-landing .overview-narrative strong {
              color: var(--uiao-navy); font-weight: 600;
            }

            /* Dependency table */
            .uiao-landing .dep-table {
              width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
              margin: 2rem 0; font-size: .92rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .dep-table th {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .15em;
              text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--uiao-teal);
              text-align: left; padding: .9rem 1rem;
              border-bottom: 2px solid var(--uiao-teal);
              background: var(--uiao-paper-2);
            }
            .uiao-landing .dep-table td {
              padding: .75rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              color: var(--uiao-ink); vertical-align: top;
            }
            .uiao-landing .dep-table tr:hover td {
              background: var(--uiao-teal-bg);
            }
            .uiao-landing .dep-table .dep-id {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .78rem; color: var(--uiao-teal); font-weight: 500;
            }

            /* Modernization arc */
            .uiao-landing .arc-grid {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(170px, 1fr));
              gap: 1px; background: var(--uiao-line);
              border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line); border-radius: 6px;
              overflow: hidden; margin: 2rem 0;
            }
            .uiao-landing .arc-phase {
              background: white; padding: 1.5rem 1.2rem;
              text-align: center;
              transition: background .2s;
            }
            .uiao-landing .arc-phase:hover { background: var(--uiao-teal-bg); }
            .uiao-landing .arc-phase .phase-num {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 500;
              color: var(--uiao-teal); margin-bottom: .4rem;
            }
            .uiao-landing .arc-phase .phase-name {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
              font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--uiao-navy);
              margin-bottom: .4rem; line-height: 1.25;
            }
            .uiao-landing .arc-phase .phase-desc {
              font-size: .82rem; color: var(--uiao-muted); line-height: 1.45;
            }

            /* Document cards */
            .uiao-landing .doc-cards {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
              gap: 1.25rem; margin: 2rem 0;
            }
            .uiao-landing .doc-card {
              background: white; border: 1px solid var(--uiao-line);
              border-radius: 6px; padding: 1.6rem 1.4rem;
              text-decoration: none;
              transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s, border-color .15s;
            }
            .uiao-landing .doc-card:hover {
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 14px 30px -18px rgba(13,27,46,0.18);
              border-color: var(--uiao-teal);
            }
            .uiao-landing .doc-card .doc-type {
              font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
              font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .18em;
              text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--uiao-amber);
              margin-bottom: .5rem; font-weight: 500;
            }
            .uiao-landing .doc-card .doc-title {
              font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
              font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--uiao-navy);
              margin-bottom: .5rem; line-height: 1.25;
            }
            .uiao-landing .doc-card .doc-desc {
              font-size: .85rem; color: var(--uiao-muted); line-height: 1.5;
            }
          </style>
---

::: {.uiao-landing}

```{=html}
<section class="uiao-hero">
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">Universal Enterprise · Open Architecture · Zero Trust</p>
  <h1>Identity is the <em>root namespace.</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">UIAO is a universal governance substrate that unifies identity, addressing, and overlay networks across federal, regulated, and commercial enterprises — without rip-and-replace.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a class="btn-primary" href="https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Explore the Repo</a>
    <a class="btn-ghost" href="#architecture">Architecture Overview</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="marquee-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Zero Trust</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>SSOT Architecture</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Drift Detection</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>FedRAMP 20x</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST KSIs</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>CISA SCuBA</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST CSF 2.0</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>TIC 3.0</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST 800-63</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>AD → Entra ID</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Six Control Planes</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>FIMF Adapter Registry</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Zero Trust</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>SSOT Architecture</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Drift Detection</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>FedRAMP 20x</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST KSIs</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>CISA SCuBA</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST CSF 2.0</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>TIC 3.0</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>NIST 800-63</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>AD → Entra ID</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>Six Control Planes</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><span>⬡</span>FIMF Adapter Registry</span>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="uiao-section">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;">
    <p class="section-label">Three Pillars</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Governance, Compliance, and Modernization — unified.</h2>
    <p class="section-body">UIAO ships as a single substrate that delivers all three. No per-vertical product split. Federal compliance is one mode of operation; commercial, hybrid, and multi-cloud are first-class targets.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="pillars">
    <div class="pillar">
      <div class="pillar-label">Governance</div>
      <h3>Canon as the source of truth.</h3>
      <p>A protected corpus of authoritative schemas, registries, and policies. Every governance claim traces to a certificate-anchored origin. No backfilling, no orphan claims.</p>
      <a class="pillar-link" href="modernization/index.html">Governance canon</a>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar compliance">
      <div class="pillar-label">Compliance</div>
      <h3>Continuous evidence, not quarterly attestation.</h3>
      <p>163 cryptographically-signed Key Security Indicators. OSCAL-native SSPs. Drift detection across schema, semantic, provenance, authorization, and identity classes — with SLA-enforced remediation.</p>
      <a class="pillar-link" href="customer-documents/compliance/index.html">Compliance pillar</a>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar modernization">
      <div class="pillar-label">Modernization</div>
      <h3>Migration without rip-and-replace.</h3>
      <p>Vendor-neutral adapters for AD → Entra ID, PKI, RADIUS, DNS/DHCP/IPAM, and overlay fabric. Every step is incremental, reversible, and evidence-driven — across heterogeneous directory and network stacks.</p>
      <a class="pillar-link" href="modernization/directory-migration.html">Modernization program</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="uiao-section problem" id="problem">
  <div class="problem-grid">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">The Problem</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Enterprise identity, addressing, and policy don't talk.</h2>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p class="section-body">Directory migrations, network modernizations, and compliance programs each solve a slice of the problem in isolation. The seams between them are where evidence vanishes, drift accumulates, and audits fail. UIAO unifies those slices under a single architectural substrate.</p>
      <ul class="problem-list">
        <li>DNS / DHCP / IPAM fragmentation and SSOT failures</li>
        <li>GPO, SPN, and service-account blind spots during AD → Entra ID migrations</li>
        <li>Telemetry gaps that block Zero Trust, TIC 3.0, and FedRAMP 20x posture</li>
        <li>PKI, RADIUS / NPS, and LDAP-dependent apps left outside migration scope</li>
        <li>No vendor-neutral governance layer across heterogeneous directory and network stacks</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ═══ SECTION A: What UIAO Actually Is ═══ -->
<section class="uiao-section" id="what-is-uiao">
  <div class="uiao-overview-section">
    <p class="section-label">Understanding UIAO</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">What UIAO actually is.</h2>
    <div class="overview-narrative">
      <p><strong>UIAO is not a dashboard, a monitoring tool, or a consulting engagement.</strong> It is a governance transformation platform — a universal substrate that unifies identity, addressing, and overlay network governance under a single architectural model. Every governance claim in UIAO traces to a cryptographically-anchored origin. No backfilling. No orphan assertions. No "we'll fix it in the audit."</p>
      <p>The thesis is straightforward: <strong>Active Directory was never just an identity store.</strong> For twenty-five years, AD silently governed DNS resolution, DHCP scoping, certificate issuance, network segmentation, application authentication, Group Policy enforcement, and service account lifecycles. When organizations migrate to Entra ID, they move the identity — but leave behind the governance surface that AD provided. The result is an invisible crisis: eleven categories of hidden dependencies that break silently across security, compliance, and operations.</p>
      <p>UIAO exists to solve that crisis. It maps every hidden AD dependency, builds a vendor-neutral adapter layer across heterogeneous infrastructure, and delivers continuous, evidence-driven governance — not quarterly attestation artifacts. The platform operates alongside existing infrastructure with no rip-and-replace requirement, enabling incremental, reversible, and auditable modernization at every step.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ SECTION B: The Hidden Governance Crisis ═══ -->
<section class="uiao-section problem" id="governance-crisis">
  <div class="uiao-overview-section">
    <p class="section-label">The Root Cause</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Eleven hidden dependencies that break when AD goes away.</h2>
    <p class="section-body" style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Every enterprise migrating from Active Directory to Entra ID faces the same invisible problem. These eleven dependency categories silently govern your infrastructure — and none of them migrate automatically.</p>
    <table class="dep-table">
      <thead>
        <tr><th>#</th><th>Dependency Category</th><th>What Breaks</th></tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-01</td><td>Group Policy Objects (GPO)</td><td>Security baselines, drive maps, login scripts, software deployment</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-02</td><td>DNS / DHCP / IPAM</td><td>Name resolution, scope assignment, IP address management integrity</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-03</td><td>Service Principal Names (SPN)</td><td>Kerberos delegation, SQL auth, IIS app pools, clustered services</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-04</td><td>Certificate Authority / PKI</td><td>Auto-enrollment, certificate templates, OCSP, CRL distribution</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-05</td><td>RADIUS / NPS</td><td>Network access control, 802.1X, VPN authentication</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-06</td><td>LDAP-Bound Applications</td><td>Legacy apps using LDAP bind for authentication and authorization</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-07</td><td>Service Accounts</td><td>Unmanaged credentials, password rotation, privilege escalation paths</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-08</td><td>OU-Based Delegation</td><td>Administrative boundaries, RBAC models, help desk permissions</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-09</td><td>Trust Relationships</td><td>Cross-forest authentication, resource access, SID history</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-10</td><td>Schema Extensions</td><td>Custom attributes, third-party integrations, directory-dependent workflows</td></tr>
        <tr><td class="dep-id">D-11</td><td>Site Topology / Replication</td><td>DC placement, replication boundaries, subnet-to-site mappings</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ SECTION C: The Modernization Arc ═══ -->
<section class="uiao-section" id="modernization-arc">
  <div class="uiao-overview-section">
    <p class="section-label">The Journey</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Six phases from legacy to continuous governance.</h2>
    <p class="section-body" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">UIAO guides organizations through a structured modernization arc — each phase is incremental, reversible, and evidence-driven.</p>
    <div class="arc-grid">
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">00</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Discovery</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Map every AD dependency, hidden governance surface, and implicit trust relationship</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">01</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Foundation</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Stand up the platform substrate, adapter registry, and canon governance layer</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">02</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Ingestion</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Connect legacy systems via FIMF adapters; ingest current-state telemetry</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">03</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Transformation</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Apply identity, policy, and network transforms with drift detection at every step</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">04</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Validation</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Run validation suites against target state; produce compliance evidence artifacts</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arc-phase">
        <div class="phase-num">05</div>
        <div class="phase-name">Governance</div>
        <div class="phase-desc">Continuous monitoring, drift remediation, and evidence-driven compliance posture</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ SECTION D: Read the Full Story ═══ -->
<section class="uiao-section problem" id="key-documents">
  <div class="uiao-overview-section">
    <p class="section-label">Deep Dive</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Read the full story.</h2>
    <p class="section-body" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">These four documents tell the complete UIAO narrative — from the problem statement through the architecture and into operational governance.</p>
    <div class="doc-cards">
      <a class="doc-card" href="customer-documents/executive-briefs/uiao-executive-brief.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Executive Brief</div>
        <div class="doc-title">UIAO Executive Brief</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">The authoritative overview: what UIAO is, what problem it solves, and how the governance substrate works.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="doc-card" href="customer-documents/modernization/client-server-to-hybrid-cloud/00-introduction.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Architecture Series</div>
        <div class="doc-title">Client-Server to Hybrid-Cloud</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">The 11-chapter series covering the full transformation arc from legacy AD to cloud-native governance.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="doc-card" href="customer-documents/architecture-series/aodim-architecture.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Architecture</div>
        <div class="doc-title">AODIM Architecture</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">The Attribute-Oriented Dynamic Identity Model — UIAO's approach to identity as governance surface.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="doc-card" href="customer-documents/whitepapers/ad-to-entraid-migration-problem.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Whitepaper</div>
        <div class="doc-title">AD to Entra ID: The Migration Problem</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">Why every AD migration is a governance migration in disguise, and what organizations miss.</div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
<section id="architecture" class="uiao-section concepts">
  <div class="concepts-header">
    <p class="section-label">Architecture</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Eight Core Concepts.</h2>
    <p class="section-body">UIAO's architecture is expressed through eight foundational concepts spanning the full lifecycle of enterprise identity, addressing, overlay, and governance.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="concepts-grid">
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">01</div>
      <div class="concept-name">Identity as Root Namespace</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">Every entity — user, device, service, workload — is anchored to a governed identity before any other attribute is assigned.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">02</div>
      <div class="concept-name">Unified Addressing</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">DNS, DHCP, and IPAM are treated as a single coordinated plane, not independent silos. SSOT is non-negotiable.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">03</div>
      <div class="concept-name">Overlay Governance</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">Network overlays are policy-governed surfaces, not infrastructure afterthoughts. Every segment carries identity context.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">04</div>
      <div class="concept-name">DRIFT Modules</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">Composable governance modules that encode authoritative rules for drift detection, authorization, and remediation.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">05</div>
      <div class="concept-name">FIMF Adapter Registry</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">A vendor-neutral interface layer. InfoBlox, BlueCat, and any directory or network system registers as an adapter.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">06</div>
      <div class="concept-name">No Rip-and-Replace</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">UIAO operates alongside existing infrastructure. Migration is incremental, reversible, and evidence-driven at every step.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">07</div>
      <div class="concept-name">Evidence-Driven Compliance</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">Compliance posture is computed continuously from live telemetry — not asserted at audit time. Zero Trust as a runtime property.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="concept-card">
      <div class="concept-num">08</div>
      <div class="concept-name">Universal Enterprise Scope</div>
      <div class="concept-desc">Designed for any enterprise. Federal compliance is one vertical. Commercial, hybrid, and multi-cloud are first-class targets.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="uiao-section planes-wrap">
  <div class="planes-inner">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">Control Planes</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Six planes. One coherent architecture.</h2>
      <p class="section-body">UIAO separates concerns across six distinct control planes, each with its own governance surface and adapter interface — enabling independent evolution without architectural coupling.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="planes-list">
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Identity Control Plane — root namespace governance</span></div>
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Addressing Control Plane — DNS · DHCP · IPAM</span></div>
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Overlay Control Plane — network fabric governance</span></div>
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Authorization Control Plane — policy enforcement</span></div>
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Telemetry Control Plane — observability and drift detection</span></div>
      <div class="plane-item"><div class="plane-dot"></div><span class="plane-label">Migration Control Plane — AD · Entra · PKI · RADIUS</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="compliance" class="uiao-section">
  <div class="compliance-wrap">
    <div class="compliance-header">
      <p class="section-label">Compliance Alignment</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Built for the standards that matter — federal and commercial.</h2>
      <p class="section-body">UIAO produces continuous, machine-readable compliance evidence across the federal mandates that define government posture and the commercial frameworks that govern regulated enterprise.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="doc-cards" id="featured-frameworks">
      <a class="doc-card" href="appendices/Appendix-C-KSI-Mapping-Tables.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Framework · NIST</div>
        <div class="doc-title">NIST KSIs</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">Key Security Indicators mapped to NIST 800-53 Rev 5 and FedRAMP. The substrate's primary unit of continuous, signed compliance evidence.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="doc-card" href="docs/03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Framework · Federal</div>
        <div class="doc-title">FedRAMP 20x</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">Authoritative crosswalk from UIAO control planes to NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls under the FedRAMP Moderate (Class C) telemetry-based validation framework.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="doc-card" href="customer-documents/compliance/evidence-telemetry/scuba-technical-spec.html">
        <div class="doc-type">Framework · CISA SCuBA</div>
        <div class="doc-title">SCuBA / BOD 25-01</div>
        <div class="doc-desc">Two-way governance for the CISA Secure Cloud Business Applications baseline — ScubaGear assesses, ScubaConnect automates, UIAO governs.</div>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="badge-grid">
      <div class="badge">Zero Trust</div>
      <div class="badge">CISA Zero Trust Maturity</div>
      <div class="badge">TIC 3.0</div>
      <div class="badge">NIST 800-63</div>
      <div class="badge">FedRAMP 20x</div>
      <div class="badge">NIST KSIs</div>
      <div class="badge">CISA SCuBA</div>
      <div class="badge">GCC Moderate</div>
      <div class="badge">M-22-09</div>
      <div class="badge">CMMC</div>
      <div class="badge">NIST CSF 2.0</div>
      <div class="badge">ISO 27001</div>
      <div class="badge">SOC 2</div>
      <div class="badge">HIPAA</div>
      <div class="badge">PCI DSS</div>
      <div class="badge">OSCAL</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="uiao-section cta-band">
  <p class="section-label" style="text-align:center;">Open Source · Active Development</p>
  <h2 class="section-title" style="text-align:center; margin:0 auto 1rem;">Start with the architecture. Build toward governance.</h2>
  <p class="section-body" style="margin:0 auto 2rem; text-align:center;">The UIAO canon, DRIFT modules, adapter specifications, and governance tooling are all maintained in the open. Contributions and collaboration welcome.</p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <a class="btn-primary" href="https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Explore on GitHub</a>
    <a class="btn-ghost" href="docs/quickstart.html">10-Minute Quickstart</a>
  </div>
</section>
```

:::
